title: Sharps, Flats, & Naturals
description: Introduction to chromatic alteration using accidental symbols.

sessions.title: Going Up a Half Step
sessions.description: Learn about the sharp symbol and what it does.

sessions.title: Going Down a Half Step
sessions.description: Learn about the flat symbol and what it does.

levels.criteria: Understands how to raise or lower a pitch by a half-step.
